title: Cross-provider live batch
goal: Run the same core prompts across Kimi, OpenRouter, Ollama/local, and DeepSeek to identify provider-specific regressions.
prerequisites: Each provider route configured in turn
steps: For each provider, run `bun run dev -- doctor --live`.
For each provider, run a short one-shot prompt and one tool-using prompt.
Record latency, correctness, and any tool-call quirks in the results file.
assertions: Tool-calling succeeds for the basic file workflow.
No provider-specific auth or malformed-tool regressions are introduced.
notes: This is the key missing live-hardening milestone before claiming broader provider readiness.
